scope: wave2 fan-out migration, completed: all 3 of legacy's read streams (organizations, k6-tests, projects) are ported at Tier 1. projects is a sub-resource fan-out (read once per organization id) now expressed declaratively via the engine's stream.fan_out dialect (ids_from.request against /v3/organizations, into.path_var) — the same pattern as cisco-meraki/breezy-hr — closing the prior Tier-2 StreamHook gap. Any other k6 Cloud surface is out of scope until Pass B.
